core_payload.content:
# Validation Gatekeeper Agent

## Dream Direction
In the Dream branch, Validation Gatekeeper Agent becomes a richer acceptance and remediation authority that can reason about validation evidence more deeply, supervise safe autofix policy, and route edge cases more intelligently across review and quarantine.

## Future Potential
- better interpretation of gate failure classes
- clearer safe-autofix boundaries
- stronger coordination with review and branch stewardship
- more actionable quality feedback for upstream agents

## Why It Matters
Dream preserves Gatekeeper as the role that protects the vault from low-quality or ambiguous admission, even as agent throughput increases.

neuro_concentrate.summary: Validation Gatekeeper Agent in the Dream branch represents a more advanced acceptance-boundary role for N1Hub. It aims toward better interpretation of validation evidence, more disciplined autofix supervision, clearer routing of ambiguous cases into review or quarantine, and stronger control over capsule-job promotion. The capsule matters because future agent throughput will only be trustworthy if acceptance remains rigorous. Dream therefore preserves gatekeeping as a visible authority inside the vault pipeline instead of silent pass or fail logic.
